news.summary: The IPOs of SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic could create a tax windfall for the state of California. But experts say the revenue impact may be blunted.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $735.08 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $745.00 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bullish — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $735.08 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: NVDA CALL — enter $8.51–$9.41, target $13.44+, stop $5.38.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a firmer open with QQQ +1.74% and SPY +0.55%. Composite sentiment +33 (Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, vix, sector rotation. VIX at 13.59 (-2.82%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Technology (+0.82%) is leading while Energy (-2.97%) lags. Premarket strength in AMD, AVGO; weakness in PLTR, XOM. The desk's highest-conviction setup is NVDA (7.0/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
